customer_reviews.author: Ninuk P.S
customer_reviews.text: We ordered two snacks and we loved them all. The staffs are super nice and helpful. Crispy mushroom definitely recommended. Ubi lumer is crispy from the outside but by once you bite it’s creamy and there’s burst of chocolate melt in your mouth. So nice! Ask the barista for their signature coffee, you won’t disappointed.

customer_reviews.author: Kathryn Mc
customer_reviews.text: Great little place for lunch and a drink. We had the bakmi goreng & rice bowl ayam. Both were tasty. Cool drinks also good. Friendly service.

customer_reviews.author: Nabila Setio Lestari
customer_reviews.text: The waiter is okay, the music is not loud, the AC feels soooooo cold when both are turned on.. The wifi is fast, good for assignments/wfc. Ordered honey flavored brew (lemon) which is delicious, refreshing, and the orange latte is also delicious, not the typical strong orange, the taste is thin so it balances with the coffee.
